roa.docketEntryComment: DEFT'S PC1538,5 MOTION TO SUPPRESS EVIDENCE FILED
/CAL: PRELIMINARY HEARING/X: THE PEOPLE MAKE AN ORAL MOTION TO CONTINUE,//MO GRTD/CGTW/CONTD PRELIM HRG, DOP/CONTD:FOR PRELIMINARY HEARING/DOP/TE:45 MINUTES/
/CAL:TO SET OR DISPO/ACM/CTORD:GPS MONITORING IS TERMINATED UPON RETURN OFALL EQUIPMENT TO SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT,/TE:45 MIN/CONTD:PRELIMINARY HEARING/DOP/

/CAL: SHERIFF'S AFFIDAVIT WARRANT/X: SFSD WARRANT IS DISCHARGED,/ORNAS/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICEAND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSD/CTORD:DEFENDANT IS TO REPORT TO 70 OAK GROVE BY 12:00 PM ON THE NEXT BUSINESS DAY/WEAP/LCHEM/WS/RX/CTORD: DEFENDANT TO ABIDE BYSTAY AWAY ORDER ON FILE/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/X: HEARING DATE OF 01-29-20, D9 IS CONFIRMED,/DOP/

/CAL:ARRAIGNMENT/987,2/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSD//CTORD:DEFENDANT SHALL BE RELEASED WITH COORDINATED PICK-UP BY THE SHERIFF'S DEPT,/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/CTORD:AFTER FITTING OF GPS DEVICE, DEFENDANT SHALL BE COURT OR/ORCT/WEAP/LCHEM/WS/SA2:HAIGHT & CLAYTON ST, SFCA/SAORD3/SAORD/NTW/LDPX:12-06-19/CONTD: PRELIMINARY HEARING/TE: 45 MINUTES/DOP/
/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING AND MOTION TO SUPPRESS/MO PC 1385:INTEREST OF JUSTICE/
/CAL: PRELIMINARY HEARING/STWPX/CONTD: TO SET OR DISPO/DOP/
